body: Diego, thanks for looping me in on this — I had a chance to review the deck [Terranova Energy](startups/terranova-energy) sent over last week and I think there's something real here, particularly around their grid-edge storage orchestration layer. At [Halfway Capital](orgs/halfway-capital) we've been tracking this part of the stack pretty closely, and Terranova's approach to latency optimization is more defensible than what I've seen from most seed-stage teams in the space. That said, I do want to dig deeper into their go-to-market before getting too excited — the utility partnership pipeline feels thin for a Series A conversation. Would you be open to setting up a technical diligence call with the founders sometime in the next two weeks? Happy to co-lead if you're thinking about taking a meaningful position.
